detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DohaDoge._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DohaDoge.sol#653-777):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DohaDoge.sol#717)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DohaDoge.sol#791-803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DohaDoge.sol#723)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (DohaDoge.sol#811)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DohaDoge.sol#775)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DohaDoge.sol#937)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DohaDoge.sol#917)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DohaDoge.sol#919)
	DohaDoge._rOwned (DohaDoge.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DohaDoge._takeTeam(uint256) (DohaDoge.sol#931-939)
	- DohaDoge._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DohaDoge.sol#891-927)
	- DohaDoge.balanceOf(address) (DohaDoge.sol#479-483)
	- DohaDoge.constructor() (DohaDoge.sol#413-443)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DohaDoge.sol#775)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DohaDoge.sol#945)
	DohaDoge._rTotal (DohaDoge.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DohaDoge._getCurrentSupply() (DohaDoge.sol#1087-1097)
	- DohaDoge._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DohaDoge.sol#943-949)
	- DohaDoge.constructor() (DohaDoge.sol#413-443)
	- DohaDoge.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DohaDoge.sol#575-597)
